transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Northbridge Health Navigator line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to check if physical therapy at Lakeview Rehab is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, can you tell me if you're calling about medical, dental, or vision coverage?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Medical. It's physical therapy for my knee.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Just to confirm, is this medical, dental, or vision coverage?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Medical, like I said. Lakeview Rehab, physical therapy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, one more time, are we checking medical, dental, or vision benefits today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Medical. That's the third time I've said medical.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand this is frustrating. Can you confirm the provider name is Lakeview Rehab?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes! Lakeview Rehab, physical therapy, medical coverage. Can you just check it now?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for your patience. I'm having trouble pulling up your plan details right now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: So what am I supposed to do? Is it covered or not?
